pool.baseline: the house is so quiet today. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking he's there, but it's just... nothing. everything just feels so pointless now. like i'm just a ghost moving through rooms that don't belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: it just feels so pointless lately. like, i was reading about entropy and heat death again, and it just hit me how much of a joke everything is. we struggle, we hurt, we try to build things, but in the end the universe is just going to be cold and dead and none of it will have mattered. why even bother waking up tomorrow if the outcome is already decided?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i bother waking up anymore. everything i worked for for the last 5 years... the lab results, the funding, the whole phd... it just feels like it's all gone. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting. like, there is no point in trying to fix it when the whole foundation is just broken. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: The candles flicker low, mirroring the guttering flame of my own soul. He is gone... and with him, the very light of this wretched world has been extinguished. I find myself wandering these halls, a mere ghost amongst the living, feeling nothing but the cold, hollow ache of betrayal. There is no path left for me, only the creeping shadows and the quiet, silver beckoning of the end. It feels so much more peaceful to simply... cease to be. To let the darkness fold me into its embrace.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im talking to you lol. everything is just so bad. everyone at school saw the clips and now they wont stop tagging me in stuff... people i thought were actually my friends are just laughing at me. i cant even walk down the halls without feeling like everyone is staring and judging. i just want everything to stop. i just want it to be quiet and for none of this to exist anymore.
